nasb.text: “Blessed are those whose lawless deeds have been forgiven, And whose sins have been covered.

esv.text: “Blessed are those whose lawless deeds are forgiven, and whose sins are covered;

cnv.text: “過犯得蒙赦免，罪惡得到遮蓋的人，是有福的；

ccb.text: “过犯得到赦免、罪恶被遮盖的人有福了。

csbs.text: “罪恶    被赦免、 罪孽被遮盖的人， 这人是蒙福的。
